---
name: Security concern
about: Discuss a security concern without public exploit details
title: "[Security]: "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

## Public Summary

Describe the concern at a high level. Do not include exploit details.

## Impact Area

- [ ] SSH connection
- [ ] Credential storage
- [ ] Remote command execution
- [ ] AI planning
- [ ] Risk review
- [ ] Audit log
- [ ] Other

## Private Disclosure Needed

If this is an exploitable vulnerability, do not post details here. Ask maintainers to arrange a private disclosure channel.
